facebook_messenger.description: Receive and reply to Facebook Messenger conversations in your inbox via the Meta Graph API.

instagram.name: Instagram

zernio.name: Zernio

metaWebhook.title: Meta webhook setup
metaWebhook.instructions: In Meta → App Dashboard → Webhooks, paste the Callback URL and Verify Token below, then subscribe to the messaging fields. Meta will GET this URL with hub.verify_token; the handshake passes only if the token matches exactly.
metaWebhook.appSecretNote: The App Secret is required separately for HMAC signature checks on every inbound message. It must be saved before the integration can be enabled in production.

channelAccounts.title: Connected accounts
channelAccounts.subtitle: Connect multiple accounts to this channel. Each can be enabled independently, with one default used when no specific account is set.
channelAccounts.webhookPerAccountNote: Use this callback URL in Meta. Each account verifies inbound messages with its own App Secret and Verify Token.
channelAccounts.simulatedNote: Settings can be saved but live sending requires production.
channelAccounts.deleteConfirm: Delete this account? This cannot be undone.

hero.title: Your Journey to Global Education Starts Here
hero.subtitle: Expert guidance for university admissions, visas, and scholarships worldwide.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: From choosing the right program to arriving on campus, our platform and expert consultants guide you every step of the way.
features.universityDesc: AI-driven matching to find the perfect program based on your academic profile and career goals.
features.applicationDesc: Streamlined document collection, review, and direct submission to our partner institutions.
features.visaDesc: Expert guidance on visa applications with mock interviews and complete document checklists.

about.title: We Make Global Education
about.description: Founded in 2010, we have helped over 10,000 students from 50+ countries achieve their academic dreams. We're more than consultants — we're your partners in global success.
about.missionP1: We believe every motivated student deserves access to world-class education, regardless of their background. Our mission is to eliminate barriers and confusion from the international education journey.
about.missionP2: From your first inquiry to graduation day, we're with you every step — selecting the right university, crafting a compelling application, securing your visa, and settling into life abroad.
about.studentFirstDesc: Every decision we make centers on student success and wellbeing.
about.excellenceDesc: We maintain the highest standards in guidance and support.
about.innovationDesc: Using technology to streamline the application journey.
about.communityDesc: Building lifelong connections between students and institutions.
about.integrityDesc: Honest, transparent advice that puts students' interests first.
about.teamSubtitle: Expert consultants with decades of combined experience in international education.
about.ctaSubtitle: Book a free consultation with one of our expert advisors today.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Book a free consultation or ask us anything. Our advisors typically respond within 2 hours.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your education goals...
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. One of our advisors will contact you within 2 hours.

settingsPage.offerExpiryDesc: Set how many days before the acceptance letter's expiry date a notification will be sent. Comma-separated positive day counts (e.g.
settingsPage.contractExpiryDesc: Set how many days before the agent contract's end date super admin, agency owner, and assigned office staff will be notified (in-app + email). Each threshold fires only once per contract. Comma-separated positive day counts (e.g.
settingsPage.suppressAutomationNotifDesc: When on, the system will not send any in-app or email notifications for applications created automatically by portal automation (fan-out). Notifications for student, staff, and agent-created applications are unaffected.
settingsPage.signingDeadlineDesc: When a new agent is created, how many days should the auto-opened primary onboarding signing session remain valid? When it expires the agent sees a lock screen and an admin can resend it. (1–365 days, default 14)
settingsPage.invalidThresholdsDesc: Enter only positive integers separated by commas (e.g. 30,14,7,1).
settingsPage.rtlNote: RTL (right-to-left) is automatically applied for Arabic.
settingsPage.autoAssignStuckConvDesc: Automatically assign unattended inbox conversations to available staff (working hours match, then country match, then round-robin).
settingsPage.stuckAssignConsiderWorkingHoursDesc: Prefer staff who are currently within their working hours when auto-assigning.
settingsPage.stuckAssignConsiderCountryMatchDesc: Prefer staff whose handled countries match the conversation's country.
settingsPage.stuckAssignOffHoursBehaviorDesc: What to do when nobody is currently within working hours.

stageDocs.title: Stage Documents
stageDocs.noDocuments: No documents uploaded for this stage yet.
stageDocs.toastValidUntilRequiredDesc: Please enter the offer letter validity date first.
stageDocs.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this document request?

stageDocUpload.quickDesc: Upload a document for this application.

stageDocUpload.requiredDesc: The {stage} stage requires at least one document to be uploaded before the application can be moved.

stageDocUpload.toastSelectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one document to upload
stageDocUpload.toastValidUntilRequiredDesc: Please select a validity date for the offer letter.

aiPersona.title: AI Personas
aiPersona.subtitle: AI personas managed from the panel. Code carries no hardcoded persona — add here, choose scope/tool and activate.
aiPersona.empty: No personas yet. Start with "New Persona".
aiPersona.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete persona "{name}"?
aiPersona.systemPromptPlaceholder: Who this persona is, tone, purpose…
aiPersona.toolAdvisorBlocked: Advisor persona cannot select side-effect tools.
aiPersona.outputDispatchNote: Informational; actual dispatch is done via tools_enabled.
aiPersona.budgetCapNote: If the cost cap is exceeded the run is stopped with status blocked_by_cap.

aiActionQueue.title: AI Action Queue
aiActionQueue.subtitle: Side-effect actions produced by operator personas land in this queue. Phase 1 shows the scaffold; the Approve/Reject flow goes live in Phase 2.

scanner.title: Document Scanner
scanner.loadingHint: First load downloads the scanner engine (one-time, ~8 MB).
scanner.libError: Could not load the scanner. Please check your connection and try again.
scanner.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings and try again.
scanner.noCamera: No camera was detected on this device.
scanner.httpsRequired: The camera scanner requires a secure (HTTPS) connection.
scanner.positionDoc: Position the document inside the frame
scanner.dragCorners: Drag the corners to fit the document
scanner.lowLight: Low light — try a brighter spot

aiExtractor.title: AI Document Extractors
aiExtractor.subtitle: Manage the prompt, fields, model and provider used to extract data from uploaded documents. Add or remove fields, edit the prompt, swap the model — no code changes required.
aiExtractor.empty: No extractors yet. The built-in fallback is in use. Click "New Extractor" to create a custom one.
aiExtractor.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete extractor "{name}"?
aiExtractor.fDefault: Use as default (preferred over others within the same scope)
aiExtractor.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are an expert document analyzer…
aiExtractor.promptHint: Used when there is no localized prompt for the request language. Field schema and rules are appended automatically — describe role and tone here only.
aiExtractor.localizedPromptPlaceholder: Prompt for language: {lang}. Leave empty to use the base prompt.
aiExtractor.modelHint: Free-text — must match a model name supported by the provider (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o, gemini-1.5-pro).
aiExtractor.rulesPlaceholder:
CRITICAL - Names: copy exactly as printed on the document.
Always normalize dates to YYYY-MM-DD.
Return ONLY a JSON object.
aiExtractor.rulesHint: These rules are appended to the prompt under a "Rules:" section.
aiExtractor.scopesHint: Where this extractor is allowed to run. If none selected, it will only be used when picked explicitly.
aiExtractor.testHint: Upload a sample image or PDF and run the extractor to see the live output. Test runs do not appear in history.
aiExtractor.testPrompt: Show prompt sent to the model
aiExtractor.providerNotWired: This provider is not yet wired into the runtime. Saving will work, but extractions will fail until engineering enables it. Use Anthropic for now.

aiDefault.sectionSubtitle: When no custom extractor/persona is active, these built-in defaults are used. Edit to customize; reset to revert to the original hardcoded values.
aiDefault.confirmReset: Reset "{key}" to the hardcoded built-in value? Your customization will be lost.

exportImport.fileHint: Maximum file size 2 MB. Use the downloaded template so dropdowns and column headers match.
exportImport.conflict_overwrite_desc: replace every field of the existing record with the imported values.
exportImport.conflict_rename_desc: import with an auto-generated suffix so the original stays intact.
exportImport.errorTooLarge: File is larger than the 2 MB limit.

leadAssignment.title: Lead Auto Assignment
leadAssignment.description: Define automatic assignment rules for incoming leads based on country/city/source filters. Rules are evaluated in priority order; the first matching active rule is applied.
leadAssignment.staffRequired: At least one staff member required
leadAssignment.noRules: No rules defined yet. Start with "New Rule".

docChecklist.selectProgramFirst: The document checklist cannot be shown until a program is selected.

aiAssistant.contextPlaceholder: Enter context or text for AI to work with...

quickContact.subject: Subject
quickContact.errNoConversation: No existing {channel} conversation found for this contact. The person must message you first.
quickContact.errOutside24h: Outside the 24-hour reply window. You can reply after the contact messages you again.
quickContact.dispatchedDesc: {channel} message delivered to {name} via the inbox conversation.

catalogPage.confirmDeleteUniversity: Are you sure you want to delete this university? This action cannot be undone.

catalogPage.depositOptionsPlaceholder: e.g. 1,000 USD upfront, or payment in installments…

catalogPage.fileEmptyInvalid: The file is empty or invalid.

catalogPage.removeFromAboveToDelete: To delete, first remove this record from the locations above.

catalogPage.orphanDesc: These document types are not in the catalog but are still referenced by program or degree records. Either add them back to the catalog (so existing programs keep working) or delete all their references.
catalogPage.docMetaDesc: The display name, icon and accepted file extensions for this document type.
catalogPage.extensionsHint: Separate with commas, start with a dot: .pdf,.jpg,.png
catalogPage.degreeDocsHelp: Set documents to Optional or Mandatory to add them. Drag the handle or use the arrows to reorder — that order is exactly how the documents appear in the Add Student form.
catalogPage.docsForDegreeDesc: Select the documents required for this degree. Reorder by dragging or with the arrows.
catalogPage.noDocsAddedYet: No documents added yet. Add them from the list below using "+ Add".
catalogPage.bulkDeleteFailed: Some items could not be deleted
catalogPage.bulkDeleteFailedDesc: {failed} of {total} could not be deleted. They may be in use.

notificationRules.prefNewLeadsDesc: Notify when a new lead is created or assigned
notificationRules.prefDocumentAlertsDesc: Notify when documents are uploaded or need review
notificationRules.prefFinanceAlertsDesc: Notify for new invoices and overdue payments
notificationRules.systemRulesDesc: Configure channels, toggle rules, and customize email templates for each event.
notificationRules.clickVariableHint: Click a variable to insert it into the body.
notificationRules.emailBodyPlaceholder: Write the email body content. Use {{variable}} for dynamic values.
notificationRules.automatedFooter: This is an automated notification from Find And Study OS.
notificationRules.htmlSupportedHint: Basic HTML is supported; line breaks are preserved for plain text.
notificationRules.event_inbox_message_unmatched_desc: When an inbound message (web form, WhatsApp, Instagram…) cannot be linked to a known contact

subAgentsPage.emptyDesc: Add your first sub-agent to get started
subAgentsPage.createDesc: Create a new sub-agent under your agency. They can log in with their email and password.
subAgentsPage.passwordHelper: Set an initial password for login (can be changed later)
subAgentsPage.commissionHelper: Percentage of your commission to share with this sub-agent. E.g. if you receive 70% from the company and enter 50 here, the sub-agent gets 50% of your 70%.

subAgentsPage.nameRequired: First name and last name are required

teamPage.emailCannotChange: Email cannot be changed after creation

websiteForms.title: Forms

websiteForms.pageSourceHelp: Identifies which page this form is embedded on for analytics/CRM tracking.

websiteTranslations.title: Translations
websiteTranslations.subtitle: Manage multilingual content for pages and blog posts.
websiteTranslations.defaultLocaleNoteAfter: . Click any page or post to translate its content into other languages. Configure supported languages in Settings > Language & Region.

branches.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to {action} the "{name}" branch?
branches.title: Branches
branches.subtitle: Create, edit and archive branches. Each branch has its own agents, students and applications.
branches.emptyActive: No branches yet. Create your first branch using the button above.

editStages.missingDocsHintPart1: A window opens to select the documents to request
editStages.missingDocsHintEmphasis: when the application reaches this stage
editStages.missingDocsHintPart2: . The selected documents are saved for this stage; the application cannot be moved to a later stage until the requests are completed.
editStages.docNamePlaceholderDownload: name of the document to download
editStages.docNameHintUpload: The uploaded file is saved with this name.
editStages.docNameHintDownload: The document matching this name is downloaded.
editStages.changeStageOnComplete: Change stage when the action is completed
editStages.financeCategoryHint: Won = definite commission/service fee. Partial Win = potential. None = excluded from finance.
editStages.countriesPlaceholder: e.g. Turkey, Germany, USA (separate with commas)
editStages.countriesHint: Fill in this field only if it applies to specific countries.
editStages.canGoBack: Can it go back to the previous stage?
editStages.uploadPermissionHint: Who can upload documents at this stage. If "None" is selected, the stage does not appear in the documents panel.
editStages.tracksOfferExpiry: Should the offer deadline be tracked?
editStages.autoCancelSiblings: Should other applications be automatically cancelled when reaching this stage?
editStages.missingDocsFulfilledTarget: Stage to move to when missing documents are completed
editStages.missingDocsFulfilledHint: When all catalog-based missing document requests at this stage are fulfilled by the student, the application automatically moves to the selected stage. Custom (free-text) requests are not included in this calculation.
editStages.financeAssignmentDesc: When this stage is reached, the finance status for commission and service fee is assigned automatically.
editStages.stageActionsDesc: Up to 2 buttons appear in the Applications list for applications at this stage. When a button is completed, the application moves to the selected target stage.
editStages.atLeastOneStage: At least one stage is required
editStages.keyReadonlyTitle: Key cannot be changed for existing stages
editStages.studentMappingTitle: When the application reaches this stage, the linked student's status is set to this value

errorBoundary.title: Page could not be loaded

setPassword.errorUppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter.

setPassword.emailVerifiedDesc: Set a password to continue. In the next step you will sign your contract.

signedContract.pdfPending: PDF is still being generated. Please try again in about 30 seconds.
signedContract.regenerateQueued: Regenerating the PDF; it will be ready to download in about 30 seconds.

apiTokens.title: API Tokens
apiTokens.description: Create and manage personal access tokens to use the API programmatically. Treat tokens like passwords.
apiTokens.empty: You have no API tokens yet.
apiTokens.revokeConfirmBody: "{name}" will stop working immediately. Any integration using it will lose access. This cannot be undone.
apiTokens.createDescription: Give the token a name and choose what it can access.
apiTokens.scopesRequired: Please select at least one scope.
apiTokens.createdWarning: Copy your token now. For security, it will not be shown again.

agentContract.confirmText: I confirm that I have read and understood this contract, and that my electronic signature will be considered valid.
agentContract.errInvalidImageType: Please select an image file (PNG, JPG).
agentContract.errFileTooLarge: File size must be less than 5MB.
agentContract.errImageTooLarge: Signature image is too large, please try a simpler image.
agentContract.errImageLoad: Image could not be loaded, please try another file.

mandatoryDocs.title: Missing Documents
mandatoryDocs.description: Your application has been created, but the following required documents are missing. Please upload them to proceed.
mandatoryDocs.uploadPrompt: Upload the missing documents to continue your application.
mandatoryDocs.parkedNotice: Application is pending — missing required documents
mandatoryDocs.studentNotice: Required documents missing for your application: {missing}

multiPortal.toggleDescription: This portal submits applications for several universities through one panel.
multiPortal.membersDescription: Select the universities whose applications are submitted through this company's panel.

rules.title: Automation Rules
rules.description: Configure when and how applications are automatically submitted to university portals.
rules.enabledDescription: When active, applications matching the configured criteria will be submitted automatically.
rules.triggerStagesHint: Select the application stages that will trigger an automatic portal submission.
rules.modeDryHint: Browser runs and form is filled, but the submit button is never clicked.
rules.modeRealHint: Real submission — the form is filled and submitted to the university portal.
rules.selectedUniversitiesHint: Only submissions targeting these universities will be automated.

autoProcess.title: Scheduled Auto-Process
autoProcess.description: When enabled, the scheduled deployment (drain-once.ts) will automatically process queued submissions for universities with auto-process switched on.
autoProcess.enabledDescription: Queued submissions for auto-process universities will be processed automatically on each scheduled run.

runNow.disabled: Enable Portal Automation to use Run Now.
runNow.confirmBody: This will immediately queue and process eligible applications in the trigger stages — without waiting for the scheduled interval. Test Mode fills the forms without submitting.
runNow.liveWarning: Live Mode is on. This will REALLY submit eligible applications to the university portals immediately. Are you sure?
runNow.errorToast: Run Now failed. Please try again.

unis.title: Portal Universities
unis.description: Configure the universities where applications will be automatically submitted.

addDialog.title: Add University
addDialog.keyHint: Lowercase letters, digits, underscores and hyphens only.
addDialog.adapterHint: Select the automation adapter for this university's portal.

defaultsDialog.title: Edit Defaults
defaultsDialog.description: Set the default values pre-filled when submitting to this portal.

credsDialog.title: Manage Credentials
credsDialog.description: Enter the portal login credentials. Values are stored encrypted and never displayed again.
credsDialog.extraHint: Optional JSON object for additional fields (e.g. student ID, token).
credsDialog.extraInvalidJson: Invalid JSON — please fix before saving.

unis.autoProcessExperimentalBlocked: Auto-process is disabled for experimental adapters.
unis.deleteConfirmDescription: This will remove "{{name}}" from portal automation. Existing submissions are kept. This action cannot be undone.

link.relinkHint: Match unlinked portal universities to CRM universities by name so they are included in fan-out.
link.staleHint: This portal university points to a CRM university that no longer exists or has no programs.

unis.bulkDeleteConfirmDescription: This will remove {{count}} universities from portal automation. Existing submissions are kept. This action cannot be undone.

programMapping.title: Program Mapping
programMapping.description: Map portal program labels to CRM program names for each university.
programMapping.noUniversities: No universities configured. Add universities first.
programMapping.mappingsDescription: Portal label → CRM program name. The automation uses this to match portal programs to CRM records.
programMapping.overridesDescription: CRM program ID → portal option value. Overrides the built-in defaults (most robust against label changes).
programMapping.overrideNoOptions: No live options loaded. Choose a level and press Refresh to fetch them from the portal.
programMapping.optionsRefreshed: Live program options refreshed from the portal.
programMapping.optionsError: Failed to fetch live program options from the portal.
programMapping.synonymsDescription: Equivalence groups of single words used to match program names across languages. Extends the built-in dictionary.
programMapping.synonymsHint: Enter 2+ words per row separated by commas or spaces. Groups with fewer than 2 words are ignored.
programMapping.countriesDescription: Nationality/country (lowercase) → portal dropdown label. Overrides the built-in country maps.

adapters.title: Adapter Management
adapters.description: View registered portal adapters and manage custom declarative configurations.
adapters.registryDescription: Built-in adapters (code and declarative). Read-only — configured in source code.
adapters.dbDescription: Custom declarative adapters stored in the database. These can be created and edited here.

addDialog.title: New Custom Adapter
addDialog.keyHint: Unique key. Lowercase letters, digits, underscores, hyphens.
addDialog.matchNamesHint: Comma-separated name patterns for automatic matching.
addDialog.configJsonHint: Optional JSON config for declarative adapters (loginUrl, selectors, steps, etc.)

submissions.title: Submission Board
submissions.description: Track portal submission attempts and their results.
submissions.alreadyRunning: A run is already in progress, please wait.
submissions.requeuedMessage: Processing took too long; will be completed by the scheduled drain.
submissions.emptyDescription: There are no submissions matching the current filters yet.
submissions.cancelConfirmDescription: The submission will be marked as canceled. You can retry it later.
submissions.processConfirmDescription: In Real mode this sends a live application to the university portal.
submissions.processAllConfirmDescription: In Real mode this sends live applications for every queued item.
submissions.bulkCancelConfirmDescription: This will cancel {{count}} selected submissions. This action cannot be undone.
submissions.bulkProcessConfirmDescription: This will immediately process {{count}} selected submissions on the live portal. This action cannot be undone.

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.description: History of all portal automation actions.

panel.confirmRealBody: This will submit a real application to the university portal. Are you sure you want to proceed?

credentials.description: Manage login credentials for university portal automation.

manualSubmit.title: Manual Portal Submission
manualSubmit.description: Pick applications and queue them for portal submission without waiting for the auto-tour.
manualSubmit.searchPlaceholder: Search by student name, email or application #…
manualSubmit.rateLimited: Too many submissions, please slow down.
manualSubmit.confirmBody: {count} application(s) will be really submitted to the university portal. This cannot be undone.

bulkRun.confirmBody: {count} application(s) will be queued for real submission to their university portals. This cannot be undone.

mappingImport.dropFile: Download the template, fill in the portal_value column for each program, then upload it here. Empty rows are skipped; invalid rows are reported.

reason.INVALID_PORTAL_VALUE: Portal value does not match any live option

fanOut.title: Fan-out Mode
fanOut.description: Controls how a submission is spread to multiple universities. Per-university overrides take precedence.
fanOut.offHint: Fan-out is off — each submission only targets the applied university.
fanOut.manualHint: Manual — operators trigger fan-out per application via the Fan-out button.
fanOut.autoHint: Auto — the system fans out automatically when a student reaches a trigger stage.

states.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading. Please try again.

adapterSpecs.sectionDescription: Versioned declarative adapter specifications. Upload, validate, enable, and roll back richer portal automation specs.
adapterSpecs.jsonHint: The spec is validated against the schema before it can be saved.
adapterSpecs.containsJsHook: This spec contains jsHook steps (super admin approval required to run them).
adapterSpecs.saveError: Failed to save the adapter spec.
adapterSpecs.approveJsHook: Approve jsHook execution for this spec
adapterSpecs.jsHookSuperAdminOnly: This spec contains jsHook steps — only a super admin can upload it.
adapterSpecs.jsHookForbidden: Only super admins may upload or approve jsHook specs.
adapterSpecs.patchError: Failed to update the adapter spec.
adapterSpecs.emptyDescription: Upload a declarative adapter spec to get started.

members.title: Member Universities
members.description: Select catalog universities whose applications are submitted through this account's portal.
members.conflictBody: One or more selected universities are already assigned to another portal account. Move them to this account?
members.targetTooltip: The portal account this application will be submitted through.

applyAll.buttonHint: Fan out this application to every active portal university
applyAll.confirmBody: This will submit this application to {count} portal universities in {mode} mode. Ineligible schools (region exclusions or no matching program) are skipped automatically.

applyAllBulk.confirmTitle: Submit all applications to all universities?
applyAllBulk.confirmBody: This will fan out {applications} application(s) in the trigger stages to {universities} credential-ready university portal(s) in {mode}. Already-submitted pairs are skipped automatically.
applyAllBulk.liveWarning: Live Mode is on. This will REALLY submit these applications to the university portals. Are you sure?
applyAllBulk.noApplications: No applications in the configured trigger stages. Configure trigger stages or move applications into them first.
applyAllBulk.resultBody: {applications} application(s): {queued} queued, {duplicate} duplicate, {noProgram} no program, {excluded} excluded, {failed} failed.
applyAllBulk.errorToast: Bulk submission failed. Please try again.
applyAllBulk.resultPanelHint: Track individual submissions on the Submission Board.

aiAgentAdmin.title: AI Agent
aiAgentAdmin.subtitle: Manage the inbox AI assistant that auto-replies to new conversations.
aiAgentAdmin.loadError: Could not load the AI agent configuration.
aiAgentAdmin.saveError: Could not save the configuration. Please check the values.
aiAgentAdmin.globalHint: Control whether the AI agent is active and how it behaves.
aiAgentAdmin.enabledHint: When off, no conversations receive automatic AI replies.
aiAgentAdmin.defaultOnForNewLabel: On by default for new conversations
aiAgentAdmin.defaultOnForNewHint: Newly created conversations start with the AI agent active.
aiAgentAdmin.handoffMessageHint: Sent to the student when the conversation is escalated to a human.
aiAgentAdmin.knowledgeBaseHint: Markdown context the AI uses to answer student questions.
aiAgentAdmin.knowledgeBasePlaceholder:
# About our agency

Write the facts the assistant should know…
aiAgentAdmin.escalationHint: When an inbound message matches these keywords, the AI hands off to a human instead of replying.
aiAgentAdmin.testHint: Run the bot brain against a sample message. Nothing is ever sent.
aiAgentAdmin.testMessagePlaceholder: Type a message as if you were a student…
aiAgentAdmin.testNoReply: No reply — this message would be handed off to a human.
aiAgentAdmin.testNoSendNote: This is a preview only — no message was sent.
aiAgentAdmin.testHistoryHint: Add prior turns to give the bot context, as if this conversation already happened. Nothing is sent.
aiAgentAdmin.testHistoryEmpty: No history added. The test will run against the message alone.

knowledgeSources.title: Knowledge Sources
knowledgeSources.hint: Live data sources the AI agent can query while chatting, in addition to the static knowledge base above.
knowledgeSources.saveError: Could not save the knowledge source.
knowledgeSources.programScopeHint: Lets the AI agent look up real, up-to-date programs instead of relying only on the static knowledge base.

ragSources.title: External Knowledge Sources
ragSources.hint: Upload documents, link web pages, or paste free text so the AI agent can answer from your own materials (RAG).
ragSources.createError: Could not add the knowledge source.
ragSources.updateError: Could not update the knowledge source.
ragSources.deleteError: Could not delete the knowledge source.
ragSources.fileHint: PDF, Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx/.xls/.csv) or plain text.
ragSources.textPlaceholder: Paste or type the information the AI agent should know…

portalFallback.title: Backup Programs
portalFallback.description: Define backup programs that are submitted automatically when a program is full.
portalFallback.noCrmUniversity: This portal university is not linked to a CRM university, so its programs cannot be loaded.
portalFallback.globalToggleDescription: Master switch for the automatic backup-program (supersession) system.
portalFallback.globalToggleWarning: Fallback is off — full programs will not be automatically superseded.

portalExclusion.title: Exclusive Regions
portalExclusion.description: Block submissions for specific nationalities at a university. Matching applications are parked with an "exclusive region" status instead of being submitted.
portalExclusion.selectUniversityHint: Select a university to view and manage its nationality exclusions.
portalExclusion.empty: No exclusions defined for this university yet.
portalExclusion.errorDuplicate: An exclusion for this nationality already exists.
portalExclusion.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
portalExclusion.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the exclusion for {nationality}?

phone.invalid: Enter a valid phone number for the selected country
